problem.title: Reverse Bits
problem.description: Reverse bits of a given 32 bits unsigned integer.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Bit Manipulation
solutions.description: Iterate 32 times: in each iteration, shift the result left by 1 to make room, then OR in the lowest bit of n, and shift n right by 1 to expose the next bit. After 32 steps all bits have been transferred in reverse order.
